content.body:
Remove all references to the old 3-layer model (Leo→Managers→Specialists).
The new model is 2-layer: Leo (Opus) orchestrates directly to ephemeral
Specialists (Sonnet). Updated 10 rules/*.md files and 6 KB JSON docs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: refactor: update agent model from Managers to Leo ↔ Specialists
